audit_items.proof_trace: The happy path resets s_entered = false at L457. On any revert path (safeTransfer L444, auctionCallback L449, safeTransferFrom L453), no try/catch exists so the revert propagates upward, and the EVM rolls back all storage changes in the transaction — including the s_entered = true write at L418 — returning s_entered to its pre-call value of false. The Phase 02c hypothesis ('revert leaves s_entered = true') is incorrect: EVM state rollback applies unconditionally when there is no try/catch.
